refactor_notes: All NFRs covered: boundary does not touch the ORM session (NFR-F1-7, T23); repository is the sole persistence layer; service delegates cleanly; flat app/models.py removed, package form app/models/ is the only definition (no duplicate class); design tokens (--color-*, --space-*, --text-*, --font-mono) used consistently in sku_detail.html with no ad-hoc values; config-in-env enforced (T9); real branch DB throughout (NFR-F1-4, T11). No layering violations, no naming inconsistencies, no cross-cutting concerns out of place.
